purpose: Machine-readable backlog of human-approved future WellFit agents/frameworks. Entries are approved to be planned, and selected low/medium-risk entries may be built one at a time when explicitly tasked; this backlog does not automatically create agents or grant runtime authority.
approvalSource: Project owner request on 2026-05-16 confirming listed future agents/frameworks may be recorded in an approved build backlog after PR #104 policy work.
buildOrderRules: Do not build future agents in this catalog/backlog task.
Build one approved future agent/framework per PR unless Batch Execution Runner explicitly authorizes a bounded batch.
Keep first version report-only and docs/register/validator-only unless a later human-approved task says otherwise.
High/critical or protected-boundary entries require human review and cannot be automatically marked built.
Before built status, add required docs, registers, validation scripts, Work Map/TODO Index references, quality gate integration, passing checks, and PR evidence.
Critical entries are split into paired *-report-agent and *-implementation-agent phases.
*-report-agent entries may only analyze rules, check findings, emit findings, and update report-only registers/docs inside allowedFiles.
*-implementation-agent entries remain blocked until explicit Human-Approval, a documented test strategy, and an exact path allowlist are recorded.

backlogEntrySchema.allowedActions: required for critical report/implementation split entries; optional legacy field for non-critical entries
backlogEntrySchema.forbiddenActions: required for critical report/implementation split entries; optional legacy field for non-critical entries
backlogEntrySchema.requiredHumanApproval: required for critical report/implementation split entries; optional legacy field for non-critical entries

entries.reason: Human-approved future WellFit agent/framework was implemented in this task as the active report-only Agent Architect & Proposal Agent catalog entry; the future backlog placeholder is superseded by the built catalog/proposal records.
entries.expectedBenefit: Adds controlled one-agent-at-a-time proposal generation, connected-agent/register counting, risk classification, and safe build-prompt drafting while preserving protected-scope stops.
dependencies: Read AGENTS.md, Work Map, TODO Index, Current State, Agent Catalog, Approved Agent Build Backlog, Agent Extension Policy, Continuity Sentinel, Product Readiness, Risk Classifier, task governance, and PR review policy.
Generate proposals for exactly one next approved agent at a time.
Keep first version report-only; do not build future agents automatically.
protectedBoundaries: No runtime product code changes without a scoped approved task.

No token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward-authority, mission-completion-authority, health, child, location, privacy, legal, compliance, Unity/PR #13, approval, merge, repair, or deploy authority.
Report-only governance; every generated next-agent prompt requires human review before execution.

entries.reason: Status synchronized after evidence review: the report-only Human Motivation Engine register, architecture doc, validator, quality-gate integration, catalog entry, proposal/backlog evidence, continuity entry, and planning references are present; no unresolved repair_required remains. Runtime/protected authority remains forbidden.
entries.expectedBenefit: Defines healthy motivation, adaptive difficulty inputs, AI Buddy boundaries, recovery/pause rules, multisensory learning signals, protected review boundaries, and forbidden addictive mechanics before any runtime personalization or mission/reward logic is implemented.
dependencies: Read AGENTS.md, Work Map, TODO Index, Current State, Agent Catalog, Approved Agent Build Backlog, Agent Architect Policy, Agent Extension Policy, Adaptive User Insights, Research Recommendations, Website Agents, Product Readiness, and Risk Classifier.
Build only documentation/register/validation outputs first; do not modify runtime product code or protected areas.
Keep child, health, location, camera, biometric, consent, privacy, token, wallet, payment, betting, reward-authority, and mission-completion-authority behavior protected/review_required.
protectedBoundaries: No runtime product code changes, runtime personalization, protected-data use, token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward-authority, mission-completion-authority, health, child, location, privacy, legal, compliance, Unity/PR #13, approval, merge, repair, or deploy authority.

Do not create manipulative addiction mechanics, FOMO pressure, shame loops, sleep-deprivation pressure, child-targeted monetization, gambling-like rewards, lootbox money-near rewards, social humiliation, paywall mission chains, hidden sponsor pressure, dark-pattern notifications, or medical/weight-loss overclaims.
Because risk is high/protected-boundary-adjacent, do not mark built without human-reviewed PR evidence and passing report-only validator.
entries.nextRecommendedAction: Continue the autonomous approved-agent loop with the next eligible already-approved report-only framework after existing built statuses are synchronized.

entries.reason: Status synchronized after evidence review: the report-only Ethical Engagement Guard register, architecture doc, validator, quality-gate integration, catalog entry, proposal/backlog evidence, continuity entry, and planning references are present; no unresolved repair_required remains. Runtime/protected authority remains forbidden.
entries.expectedBenefit: Creates a safe source of truth for healthy, age-appropriate, recovery-aware, consent-preserving, trust-preserving, non-manipulative engagement checks across missions, rewards, AI Buddy tone, retention mechanics, website claims, social features, sponsors, and monetization proposals.

Report-only governance by default; human review required for protected or high/critical scope.

entries.reason: Report-only phase split from critical backlog entry `mission-factory-agent`. This phase may analyze rules, issue findings, and update governance registers/docs only; Built as a critical-risk but strictly report-only Mission Factory Agent framework with human-reviewed PR evidence requirements and docs/register/validator/governance-only scope; Runtime, protected, authority, forbidden, and review_required boundaries remain explicit. No runtime mission generation, mission completion authority, reward authority, anti-cheat, protected data, Unity/AR, or deployment behavior was added.

allowedActions: Analyze existing docs, registers, validators, backlog metadata, and protected-boundary rules for the scoped domain.
Check governance rules and emit findings, gaps, risk notes, and human-review questions.
